faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Travis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day drain fly treatment services throughout Travis and Staten Island. Our team responds quickly to your call and can typically schedule an inspection and treatment within 24 hours, depending on availability and the severity of your infestation.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection to locate breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatments, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of targeted insecticides where needed, and follow-up recommendations. The final cost depends on the severity of infestation, number of drains affected, and property size.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Travis homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in Travis due to the area's older housing stock with aging plumbing systems, high humidity levels, and proximity to wetlands. They breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. Our treatments address both the adult flies and their larvae to eliminate the entire population.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: After our treatment, maintain your drains by regularly flushing them with hot water, using enzyme-based cleaners weekly, fixing any leaks promptly, and ensuring proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchens. We provide detailed prevention guidelines specific to your Travis property and offer follow-up services if needed to ensure complete elimination.
